hero.title: Analyze the MercadoLibre market like a pro
hero.subtitle: Price trends, best-seller rankings, discounts and sellers — in a clear, actionable dashboard. Make decisions with data, not hunches.

features.title: Everything you need to understand the market
features.subtitle: Built for analysts, sellers and e-commerce teams.
features.priceText: Track how prices evolve per product over time, in local currency and USD.
features.rankingText: See who climbs and who drops in each category's best-sellers.
features.categoryText: Compare average discounts, prices and official-store share.
features.sellerText: Identify the top sellers and the presence of official stores.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Text: We capture weekly snapshots of best-sellers across the main markets.
howItWorks.step2Text: We add USD prices, discounts, ratings and seller data.
howItWorks.step3Text: You explore trends and insights in an interactive dashboard.

cta.title: Start analyzing the market today
cta.subtitle: Create your free account in seconds.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to access your dashboard.
auth.signupSubtitle: Start analyzing the market in minutes.
auth.name: Name
auth.errorGeneric: Couldn't complete the request. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Market overview
dashboard.subtitle: A general view of the available data.
dashboard.mapHint: Click a country to explore its products

productDetail.typeCatalogDesc: MercadoLibre catalog page (/p/): one product where several sellers compete for the Buy Box.
productDetail.typeUserProductDesc: Seller product (/up/): a seller's own listing, which may belong to a catalog.
productDetail.typeListingDesc: Classic listing: a single seller's listing, with no Buy Box competition.
productDetail.buyboxNote: Sellers that have won the Buy Box for this product.

tracked.title: Tracked products
tracked.subtitle: Products you follow; checked on the cadence you choose.
tracked.subscribeError: Could not track the product. Check the URL and try again.
tracked.detectUnknownEcommerce: We don't recognize this store. For now we only track MercadoLibre products.
tracked.detectUnsupportedCountry: This MercadoLibre country isn't available yet. Supported: Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Mexico, Colombia, Peru and Uruguay.
tracked.detectNotAProduct: This link doesn't look like a product. Paste the product page URL.
tracked.cadenceDays: every {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
tracked.snapshotsNote: One row per checked day; unchanged days carry forward the last snapshot's values.

categories.subtitle: Comparison of the categories with the most products.
